title: asyneuma limonifolium subsp. kellererianum
intro: Asyneuma limonifolium subsp. kellererianum, also known as Asyneuma kellererianum, is a plant species in the bellflower family that is native to the Western Ghats in India. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Asyneuma kellererianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. As a traditional herbal remedy, it can be prepared in various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
